title: Fundamental Limits on QBER and Distance in Quantum Key Distribution Stefano Pirandola Department of Computer Science, University of York, York YO10 5GH, United Kingdom Quantum key distribution (QKD) enables information-theoretic secure communication, yet its ultimatetolerancetonoiseandachievabletransmissiondistanceremainfundamentallyconstrained. Our results follow from a fundamental capacity threshold for qubit Pauli channels and apply to protocols based on two or more mutually unbiased bases, using either single-photon or weak coherent sources.
